run_summary.summary: 🚨 Brandi still can't run — Gmail token is still expired (2026-06-20). No emails scanned. A re-auth helper script is ready at scripts/gmail-reauth.mjs — run it locally to generate a fresh token. Details in the suggestions below.
run_summary.error: Gmail OAuth token expired or revoked (invalid_grant). Re-authorization required.

suggestions.message: Gmail token is still expired — multiple days of missed scans. A re-auth script is waiting at scripts/gmail-reauth.mjs. Run `node scripts/gmail-reauth.mjs` locally (it'll open a browser consent screen for hartmanncollabs@gmail.com), then update the refresh token in Vercel env vars and redeploy. Full steps print to the terminal when the script completes.
